---
title: "Mini Project 3: Data Viz Re-Design"
toc: true
toc-location: right
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
params:
  number: 3
  weight: '9%'
  purpose: 'At some point in your career, you will likely be involved in creating or revising a summary chart of some data. When that happens, you will also likely be the most knowledgeable person in the room about what to do to design the chart(s) to effectively communicate the information in the data. Claude Code can write the ggplot code once you know what you want -- but deciding what "leadership" means in this data, choosing the right chart type for each message, and honestly critiquing whether your redesign actually improved things are judgment calls no agent can make for you. This assignment is a practice run for that day.'
---

```{r child = here::here("fragments", "placeholder.qmd")}
```
